query:
SELECT id, name, isPremium, hasRegistered, LEFT(lastSignedIn, 19) as lastSignedIn 
FROM users 
WHERE hasRegistered = 1 OR isPremium = 1
ORDER BY lastSignedIn DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT id, name, isPremium, hasRegistered, LEFT(lastSignedIn, 19) as lastSignedIn 
FROM users 
WHERE hasRegistered = 1 OR isPremium = 1
ORDER BY lastSignedIn DESC
LIMIT 20;
